/clang64/bin/c++.exe -shared -Wl,--enable-auto-import -o msys-log.dll -Wl,--out-implib,liblog.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 CMakeFiles/log.dir/cxxlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/lognone.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mArray.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mArray_none.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mList.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/mem_management.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/memorypool.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printFunction.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printf/myPrintf.c.o CMakeFiles/log.dir/printf/vsnprintf.c.o  -lpthread
